Name: RainCloud
Notes: A cloud platform that can be stood on using the Bee power-up. If the player does not have this power-up and steps on the platform, they will fall through it. The platform remains stationary or moves on a path. By default, rain will fall from this platform, causing the player to lose the Bee power-up upon passing under it.

Obj_arg0.Name: Rain/Shadow Length
Obj_arg0.Description: Sets the rain length. This also sets the shadow drop length. Default is 1000. No rain will appear if Obj_arg3 is set.

Obj_arg3.Name: Is not Raining?
Obj_arg3.Description: If set, no rain will fall from the cloud.

Point_arg0.Name: Movement Speed / Time
Point_arg0.Description: The movement speed the object has starting from this point. If Point_arg7 is set to 1, this specifies the time in frames it takes to reach the next point.

Point_arg5.Name: Stop Time
Point_arg5.Description: The time in frames the object waits at this point before it continues moving again.

RailObj_arg1.Name: Movement Type
RailObj_arg1.Description: How the object behaves once it reaches the last path point.

Values.Notes: Disappears and reappears at first point

Rail.Description: The path that it can move on.

ClippingGroup.Description: Objects in this group are always clipped together.
